# WizBee – AI Beekeeping Assistant

> WizBee is the conversational AI assistant built into b.tree (btree.at), a beekeeping management platform for professional beekeepers. It uses Mistral AI with tool calling to let beekeepers manage their hives, apiaries, treatments, harvests, and more through natural language.

## About

- **Product**: WizBee
- **Website**: https://wiz-bee.com
- **Parent platform**: b.tree – https://www.btree.at
- **Author**: Hannes Oberreiter, btree.at
- **Technology**: Mistral AI, streaming, tool calling
- **Language support**: Multi-language (responds in the user's language)

## What WizBee can do

- Hive & apiary management: query hive details, queen status, move history
- Feeding management: create and update feeding records
- Harvest management: log honey harvests with type, amount, and water content
- Treatment management: record and track Varroa and other treatments
- Hive checkups: log full inspections including brood ratings and colony strength
- Stock & inventory: manage supplies like sugar, medications, and honey jars
- Statistics & analytics: harvest totals, feeding averages, treatment history
- Weather & seasonal advice: context-aware guidance based on current season and apiary weather
- Sugar-water calculator: 1:1 and 3:2 mixtures for spring and autumn feeding
- Todos & reminders: create one-off or repeating reminders per apiary
